subject: General Awareness
question_text: Which of the following criteria best explains why Bharat Ratna recipients in recent years have come from diverse fields such as politics, science, and social service?

options.text: It is restricted to government officials only
It recognizes exceptional service in any field of human endeavor
It is awarded based on public voting
It is limited to posthumous awards

solution.final_answer: Recognizes exceptional service in any field

explanation.concept: Bharat Ratna is awarded for exceptional service/performance of the highest order in any field of human endeavor.

why_correct.B: Correct as the award is not restricted to any specific field.
